run.needTargets: Load or enter targets, then click Save targets to enable this.

scaffold.noOperation: No mutation operation for this workload yet.

users.title: Identities
operations: Look up a user by ID or UPN
Assign or remove licenses and roles

mutate.title: Randomize an attribute
mutate.description: Picks one attribute at random (from the set {{attributes}}) and overwrites it with a random value on every identity listed above (when Identities is enabled).

mail.title: Mail
operations: Send a new mail message as a mailbox

mutate.title: Randomize mailbox activity
mutate.description: For each selected mailbox, performs one random action: send a new message ({{send}}%), reply to an existing message (35%), forward one message to another randomly-selected user (30%){{deletions}}. Random subject and body text come from OpenRouter when a key is configured, otherwise they're a simple GUID.
mutate.deletionsClause: , or move one to Deleted Items (5%)

calendar.title: Calendar
operations: Create a calendar event with attendees

mutate.title: Randomize calendar activity
mutate.description: For each selected mailbox, performs one random action: create a meeting request inviting another selected user (50%) or create a single-user appointment (50%). Each is a 30-minute event on a weekday within the sender's working hours, with a random subject from OpenRouter when a key is configured.

files.title: Files
operations: Upload a document to a user's OneDrive
Upload a document to a SharePoint site library
Remove a document from OneDrive or SharePoint

deletions.title: Deletions
deletions.lede: Delete a range of items across a user's workloads to test deleted-item recovery and retention. Choose the users, pick which workloads to touch, then scope the deletion by date.

workloads.title: Workloads
workloads.subtitle: Which data to delete from. Select one or more.

scope.title: What to delete
scope.subtitle: Items are matched by the date they arrived — received date for mail, created date for calendar events and files. Boundary dates are included.
scope.allDesc: Delete every item, regardless of date
scope.afterDesc: Only items dated on or after the date
scope.beforeDesc: Only items dated on or before the date
scope.betweenDesc: Only items inside a date range
scope.orderError: The start date must not be after the end date.

summary.all: Delete every item from {{workloads}} for the selected users.
summary.after: Delete items dated on or after {{date}} from {{workloads}} for the selected users.
summary.before: Delete items dated on or before {{date}} from {{workloads}} for the selected users.
summary.between: Delete items dated between {{from}} and {{to}} from {{workloads}} for the selected users.

deletions.acknowledge: I understand this deletes items for the selected users
deletions.needConfirm: Select workloads, confirm the acknowledgement, and save targets to enable this.
deletions.runSummary: Deleted {{deleted}} of {{matched}} matched items across {{users}} user(s)
deletions.toastNone: No matching items were found to delete
